title: Al-Ma'mun's appointment of Tahir b. al-Husayn as governor of Khurasan and the East; Tahir's suspicions of al-Ma'mun's good faith towards him and his scheming with the Caliph's minister Ahmad b. Abi Kh
description: Al-Ma'mun's appointment of Tahir b. al-Husayn as governor of Khurasan and the East; Tahir's suspicions of al-Ma'mun's good faith towards him and his scheming with the Caliph's minister Ahmad b. Abi Kh. Recorded under the year 205 AH (820–821 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
